mission.title: fluent-bit: filter_kubernetes: add kubernetes_namespace metadata
mission.description:
This provides the ability to have the filter_kubernetes plugin fetch namespace labels & annotations and add them to the record under a `kubernetes_namespace` key. 

- Added 3 new configuration options:
   - `kube_meta_namespace_cache_ttl` - `FLB_CONFIG_MAP_TIME` - the TTL for the namespace cache
   - `namespace_annotations` - `FLB_CONFIG_MAP_BOOL` - On if you want namespace annotations added to the record. Default: Off
   - `namespace_labels` - `FLB_CONFIG_MAP_BOOL` - On if you want namespace la

steps.title: Understand the problem
steps.description:
This provides the ability to have the filter_kubernetes plugin fetch namespace labels & annotations and add them to the record under a `kubernetes_namespace` key. 

- Added 3 new configuration options

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
[FILTER]
    Name kubernetes
    Match kube*
    K8S-Logging.Parser Off
    K8S-Logging.Exclude Off
    Use_Kubelet On
    Buffer_Size  1MB
    Annotations Off
    namespace_labels  On
    namespace_annotations On
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/fluent/fluent-bit-docs/pull/1273. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.
